## Goal

What should improve?

## Why It Matters

Explain the value for one or more of these:

- website visitors
- SEO
- Azure delivery quality
- public showcase quality

## Proposed Direction

Describe the preferred approach if you already have one.

## Scope

Which areas are affected?

- [ ] Website UX
- [ ] Content or SEO
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Azure architecture
- [ ] CI/CD

## Notes

Anything that should be considered early.
